sentence: The first campus of its kind in India University of Southampton Delhi is the first campus of its kind in India - and a proud part of University of Southampton, a global Top 100 university, and part of the Russell Group, the UK's top-tier of elite universities.
We are regulated in India by University Grants Commission (UGC) to operate our campus and deliver programmes.

Ranked top 100 in the world Source: QS World University Rankings 2026 Top 15 UK institution for employability Source: QS Graduate Employability Rankings, 2022 Founding member of the Russell Group A group of prestigious UK research-intensive universities, and equivalent to the US ‘Ivy League’
keywords: QS World University Rankings 2026QS Graduate Employability RankingsRussell Group

sentence: Discover our programmes Our programmes are taught in English, and content is equivalent to that delivered to other University of Southampton students.
To match the programme lengths of internationally respected UK awarded degrees, undergraduates study for three years, and postgraduates study for one year.

See the campus for yourself Block III, International Tech Park Gurgaon,Sector 59, Off Golf Course Ext Rd,Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India Open address in Google Maps Experience an Open Day Throughout the day, visitors can talk to our university leadership team, to members of faculty, attend taster sessions, and explore our undergraduate and postgraduate programmes.
It is a great opportunity to ask about scholarships, bursaries and other financial aid packages, and get clarity on our admissions process, eligibility requirements and key deadlines.
